issues.description: First effect with trigger 'Trigger' and action 'PlaySelf' is nonsensical and not supported by card text. Should be removed.
Condition is 'Always' but text requires 'If you have 1 or less Life cards'. Should be a life total condition.
Trigger is 'OnPlay' but text says '[Your Turn]', indicating continuous effect during your turn. Should be 'StartOfTurn' or similar persistent trigger.
Target is 'AllOwnCharacters' but text specifies only 'Edward.Newgate' and Characters with type 'Whitebeard Pirates'. Should use a filtered scope.
Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but '[Your Turn]' in text indicates effect lasts during your turn phase. Should be 'DuringYourTurn'.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Your Turn] If you have 1 or less Life cards, your [Edward.Newgate] and all your Characters with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" gain +2000 power.
